opportunities.specific_product: storage ottoman + under-bed storage bins bundle
opportunities.transformation_hook: $59 turns a chaotic dorm room into a clutter-free space
opportunities.before_state: Cramped dorm room with boxes on the floor, no under-bed storage, and a cluttered desk
opportunities.after_state: Organized dorm with under-bed bins, a storage ottoman doubling as seating, and clear floor space
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is running a wave of dorm-decor pins right now (headboards, curtains, diffusers, storage) as back-to-school shopping ramps up ahead of August move-in.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $45 slipcover hides pet hair and stains instantly
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained couch covered in visible pet hair and faded fabric
opportunities.after_state: Fresh, tailored slipcover with no visible stains — looks like brand-new furniture
opportunities.why_now: Couch covers remain the highest-commission category we carry (24-30%) and summer shedding season keeps 'pet hair couch cover' searches elevated.

opportunities.specific_product: brushed gold cabinet pulls + peel-and-stick tile backsplash kit
opportunities.transformation_hook: $38 hardware swap makes cabinets look brand new
opportunities.before_state: Dated brass hardware on plain, builder-grade white cabinets
opportunities.after_state: Modern brushed gold pulls paired with a textured backsplash for a boutique kitchen look
buyer_intent_keywords: kitchen cabinet makeover on a budget
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple just flagged 2027 cabinet trend shifts away from all-white kitchens, signaling viewers are primed for cabinet-refresh content.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia glass food storage container set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $34 swap ditches scratched plastic for matching glass
opportunities.before_state: Mismatched, stained plastic containers with missing lids crammed into a cabinet
opportunities.after_state: Matching stackable glass containers neatly lined on an organized pantry shelf
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple's 'nontoxic, microplastic-free kitchen swaps at Amazon' pin is a direct, timely purchase-intent signal today.

opportunities.specific_product: entryway storage bench with mirror and hooks
opportunities.transformation_hook: $89 bench turns a cluttered entry into a mini mudroom
opportunities.before_state: Shoes piled by the door, coats on the floor, no mirror or seating
opportunities.after_state: Bench with hidden storage, mirror above, and coat hooks creating a tidy, welcoming entry
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's entryway staples pin (light fixtures, mirrors, storage) is circulating now, and back-to-school season is intensifying entryway clutter pain points.
